title: pouzolzia viminea var. glabrata
intro: Pouzolzia viminea var. glabrata, also known as the 'Slippery Eyebulb' or 'Tropical Woodruff', is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pouzolzia viminea var. glabrata include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
